title: taraxacum cognatum
intro: Taraxacum cognatum is a lesser-known species of dandelion, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cognatum include its ability to support liver health, improve digestion, and reduce blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum cognatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
